title: Hooks: keep LEGACY_HELPER_RE as marked transition guard; sweep hook prose/messages; file grooming debt
action: Per D3: LEGACY_HELPER_RE (bee-write-guard.mjs ~line 130) STAYS — update its comment to state it is a transition guard for hosts whose vendored bins predate shim-retire, slated for grooming removal. Sweep comments and any user-facing message text in the three hooks that name bee_*.mjs to the `bee.mjs <group> <verb>` form (comments may mention legacy names only where explaining the legacy regex). Ensure hooks/test_write_guard.mjs covers BOTH shapes: legacy `bee_cells.mjs cap ...` command strings still resolve to registry entries, and `bee.mjs cells cap ...` shapes resolve too — add the dispatcher-shape case (verified missing). SITUATION UPDATE (supersedes the earlier 'do not flip' instruction): cell shim-retire-1 already synced the repo's vendored .bee/bin/lib — guards.mjs now prints the NEW dispatcher-form messages, so BOTH hook suites are currently RED (verified by the orchestrator: test_write_guard exit 1, test_hook_contracts exit 1). Your job now INCLUDES flipping the expected guard-message assertions to the new strings: hooks/test_write_guard.mjs (~143,153,163,172,211,264,274,295,311) and hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs (~1828) — change includes('bee_state.mjs ...') / includes('bee_backlog.mjs add') to the new `bee.mjs state ...` / `bee.mjs backlog add` forms as actually printed by .bee/bin/lib/guards.mjs (read the real strings there, do not guess). Your verify must end GREEN. File the debt: node .bee/bin/bee.mjs backlog add with a note to remove LEGACY_HELPER_RE after hosts have re-onboarded past this release.

truths: legacy shim command shapes still resolve in the write guard (transition)
dispatcher command shapes resolve in the write guard (new test case)
guard-message assertions match the freshly vendored lib strings and both hook suites are green
a backlog item exists for the eventual regex removal
artifacts: backlog entry id in the done report
key_links: plan-check finding B4 (resolved early: vendor lib synced in cell 1)
prohibitions: do not weaken any guard branch
do not edit .bee/bin/lib (already synced; read-only reference for expected strings)

trace.outcome: Flipped write-guard/hook-contracts assertions to the new bee.mjs state/bee.mjs backlog message strings, kept LEGACY_HELPER_RE as a documented D3 transition guard, swept shim-name prose in the 3 hooks, fixed a real copyLib bug (missing claims.mjs) that was fail-opening every write-guard fixture row, added legacy+dispatcher CLI-shape coverage for cells.cap, and filed the LEGACY_HELPER_RE removal debt.
